title: quercus aquifolioides
intro: Quercus aquifolioides, also known as the Asian evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to China, Japan, and the Korean Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, attributed to the presence of quercetin and other polyphenolic compounds. The health benefits of Quercus aquifolioides are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Quercus aquifolioides can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
